summary: Code quality fixes iteration 16 testing complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working. CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: update_transaction now uses `updated_txn` variable instead of undefined `i`.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Owner login successful
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/kpis - Returns KPI data
Backend: GET /api/products - Returns products list
Backend: GET /api/markets - Returns markets list
Backend: Market Mode full POS flow (start session, add transaction, update transaction, delete transaction, end session)
Backend: PUT /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/transaction/{txn_id} - CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED (no undefined variable)
Backend: DELETE /api/market-mode/sessions/{id}/transaction/{txn_id} - Works correctly
Backend: PUT non-existent transaction returns 404
Backend: DELETE non-existent transaction returns 404
Backend: GET /api/export/market-transactions-excel - Returns Excel file
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/scale-planner - Returns projection data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/market-comparison - Returns market data with first_session_date
Frontend: Login as owner works
Frontend: Dashboard loads with KPIs and charts
Frontend: Market Mode - Training mode with clickable products
Frontend: Market Mode - Start Session creates LIVE session
Frontend: Market Mode - CASH/EFTPOS payment buttons work
Frontend: Market Mode - Transaction log shows edit/delete icons on hover
Frontend: Market Mode - Pause/Resume toggle works
Frontend: Market Mode - Save & End disabled when paused
Frontend: Scale Planner - Auto-fetches when target revenue changes
Frontend: Scale Planner - Shows schedule impact with SCHEDULE_DAYS constant
Frontend: Market Comparison - Shows date coverage badge
Frontend: Allocation Tool - Shows forecast panel
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: server.py update_transaction (line 2232-2247) now correctly uses `updated_txn` variable instead of undefined `i`
ScalePlanner fetchPlan wrapped in useCallback with proper [targetRevenue, weeksHorizon] deps
TransactionWidgets.jsx extracted from MarketMode.jsx - clean component separation
SCHEDULE_DAYS constant extracted for schedule impact display
Market Comparison shows first_session_date for date coverage badge
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products and markets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality fixes verified. Key changes: (1) server.py update_transaction fixed - uses updated_txn variable instead of undefined i. (2) ScalePlanner useCallback with proper deps. (3) TransactionWidgets.jsx extracted from MarketMode.jsx. (4) Constants extracted: BAR_RADIUS_TOP, FORECAST_PERIODS, SCHEDULE_DAYS.
